titleStmt.title: Amarakoṣa, with excerpts from a Sinhalese commentary (ed. Guṇaśekara, n.d.)

msContents.summary: This extract comes from the Siṃhala Granthārṇavaya, a collection of Sinhalese texts compiled by Abraham Mendis Guṇaśekara. No date is given in the book, but it was likely published near the beginning of the 20th century. These photographs are from the copy kept at the Staatsbibliothek zu Berlin.

listBibl.bibl: Vogel, Claus. 2013. Indian Lexicography. Revised edition. München: P. Kirchheim.

encodingDesc.p: ISO 15919 transliteration, apart from ṃ for anusvāra and ṛ for vocalic ṛ. Underscore to indicate explicit virāma.

body.head: purāṇa sannayē prārambhaya.

namastasmai bhagavaterhate samyak
sambuddhāya ෴

lg.l: sevyatāmakṣayo dhīrāḥ sa śriye cāmṛtāya ca ෴

body.p:
śāstrārambhayehi sarvajñayanaṭa pūjā vidhānakaḷa
kal_hi parahitavū anuśāsanayen_ vighnopaśa
maya karan_nāvū puṇya sam_pattiya ræs_karan_
nō yasya jñānadayāsindhoḥ yanādi mē so
lovak_ dæk_vūhu ෴ jñāna, samastavastu viṣayavū
parijñānayen_ hā; dayā, duḥkhayen_ samuddharaṇavāṃjā
lakṣaṇavū karuṇāyen; sindhoḥ, sāgarayak_ væ
nivū nohot_ uk_talakṣaṇavū jñānadayā de
denāṭa vipulādhāraheyin_ sāgarayak_ vænivū;
agādhasya, anut_ visin_ pātālatala nodak_nā
lada jñānadayā dedenāgē keḷavara ætiheyin_
pirisin̆dagata nohæk_kāvū gāmbhīryya æti; yasya,
yam_ sarvajñayak_hugē; guṇāḥ, maitrīkṣamopaśa
mādī guṇayō; anaghāḥ, rāgādidoṣa rahitayōda;
he dhīrāḥ, pan̆ḍitavaruni; akṣayaḥ, parama karuṇādī
guṇaśālit_vayen_ma parahita sukha sampādanaye
hilā kṣayak_ næt_tāvū hevat_ virāmayak_ næt_
tāvū nohot_ saṃsārayen_ sun_darasthānayaṭa
giya bava hetukoṭageṇa ajarāmara heyin_ kṣa
yak_ næt_tāvū; saḥ, ē sarvajñatema; śriyeca, tri
vargga sampattiya piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, nivan_ pi
ṇisada; sevyatām, topa visin_ sevunālæbē
vā ෴

me solova sarvajñayan_gē sāgaratvayen_
rūpaṇaya heyin_ sarvajñan_ṭa hā sāgarayaṭa
ś_leṣayi ෴ mehi samudrayāgē agādhat_vanam_ pā
tālaya nodæk_kahækibavaya anaṣavū guṇayō
nam_ rat_nākarat_vādihuya akṣayatvanam_ paripūrṇa
bavaya śrīnam_ śrīdevatāya amṛtanam_ amāyayi data
yutu. yasya jñāna dayā sindhoḥ yanādiyen_ iṣ_ṭa
dēvatāśrīrvāda dæk_vūhu. śriyeca amṛtāyaca yan_
nen_ sakalajñānapravṛttiya phalaprāmaṇa heyin_
pravṛtti phala dæk_vūhu ෴

me solokavehi śleṣayen_ taman_ karaṇa
śāstrayāgēda svarūpa kīha. heda mesē datayu
tu ෴ jñānadayā, kavit_va vaktṛt_vādiyehihō
aṣ_ṭādaśa vidyāsthānayehi jñānadāna sampattiya
hetukoṭagena; sindhoḥ, sāgarayak_ vænivū;
agādhasya, anantaroktavū guṇayōgaya he
tukoṭageṇa patul_ nodæk_ka hæk_kāvū; yasya,
yam_ śāstrayak_hugē; guṇāḥ, laghut_va viṣ_paṣṭatvādivū
guṇayō; anaghāḥ, śubhahetuhuda; he dhīrāḥ, paṇ_ḍita
variṇi; akṣayaḥ, sampūrṇavū; saḥ, ē jñānadayāsin_dhuva
temē hevat_ mē nāmaliṅgānuśāsanaya nema;
śriyeca, trivargasampattiya piṇisada nohot_
vāṅmaya śil_pa dænīma lakṣaṇakoṭa æti svārthasam
pat_tiya taddhetukatrivarggahetuvū parārtha sampattī
ya yana mē svārtha sampat_ parārtha sampat_ deka
piṇisada; amṛtāyaca, ē svārtha sampat_tiyenudu
puṇyajñāna sambhārayen_ ayat_nayen_ siddhavan_
nāvū mokṣaya piṇisada; sevyatām, śruti cin_tā
vyākhyānādi lakṣaṇavū sēvāva karaṇulæbēvā ෴

mē śāstra pakṣayehi dānaṃ dā yana vākya
yehi ḍudāñ-dāne yana dhātuhu keren_ sam
padādibhyaḥ k_vip_ca yi k_vip_ kaḷa kal_hi dā kiyā ti
beyi. jñānasya dā jñānadā tasyā īḥ lakṣmīḥ jñāna
de yi vākya geṇa ṣaṣṭhīsamāsakoṭa jñānade
śabdaya siddhakal_hi ohu keren_ tṛtīyākaḷa
kala jñānadayā yi kiyā rūpaya veyi datayutu ෴
